history.text: Funan appears in Cambodia's historical record.

Khmer Empire ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.

Cambodia became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Angkor Wat:
worthSeeing.text: The world's largest religious monument, a 12th-century Khmer temple complex.

worthSeeing.title: Tonle Sap Lake:
worthSeeing.text: Southeast Asia's largest freshwater lake, home to floating villages.

worthSeeing.title: Phnom Penh:
worthSeeing.text: Cambodian capital with the Royal Palace, Silver Pagoda, and Killing Fields memorials.
